allocation.no_plan: No allocation plan generated yet. Run the allocation from the Dashboard.

audit.no_allocation: No Allocation Plan yet. Run allocation to see equity audit.
audit.title: Systematic bias and allocation fairness analysis
audit.no_bias_desc: All vulnerable zones met the minimum resource thresholds for equitable distribution.
audit.historical_desc: Tracking fairness scores across all generated plans
audit.warning_desc: One or more remote zones received less than 40% of required resources. Run full audit for details.
audit.equity_desc: AI analysis of systematic bias across all zones based on road accessibility and fulfillment ratio.

ai.title: Conversational AI
ai.subtitle: Reallocate resources with natural language
ai.quick_action_2: Add 200 food packs to nearest depot
ai.hello: Hello, I am ReliefRoute AI. How can I help you adjust the allocation plan today?
ai.error: Sorry, I encountered an error communicating with the AI service.

dashboard.stale_warning: Some zones are using outdated or placeholder data. Please update them in the Zones page.

sync.error_desc: The application encountered an unexpected error. Please try refreshing the page.

landing.hero_title: Smart Resource Allocation for When Disaster Strikes.
landing.hero_desc: ReliefRoute automatically matches the nearest available resources to the most critical zones, minimizing delivery time while ensuring no community is left behind—
landing.tech_desc: Designed to operate in the most challenging environments with zero compromises on analytical power, security, and reliability.
landing.f1_desc: Intelligent resource matching using Gemini 1.5 Flash to justify every decision and optimize delivery routes dynamically.
landing.f2_desc: Operate completely offline. Our 3-mode relay ensures your operations never stop, gracefully degrading to SMS fallback when necessary.
landing.f3_desc: Systematic bias detection ensures that the most remote and vulnerable communities receive their required minimum thresholds.
landing.f4_desc: Live Leaflet integration visualizes critical zones, priority scoring, and exact depot locations for absolute situational awareness.
landing.f5_desc: Chat naturally with the ReliefRoute AI. Ask to 'reallocate 50 medkits to Zone 3' and watch the engine securely update the master plan.
landing.f6_desc: State synchronization powered by IndexedDB and a resilient backend SQLite instance using WAL (Write-Ahead Logging).
landing.footer_desc: Providing cutting-edge software infrastructure for rapid, equitable, and intelligent disaster relief response across the globe.
landing.footer_tagline: Built with precision. Designed for humanity.
